summary: Recording is unusable static, rendering the concert unlistenable.
review: Both reviewers report that the file consists only of static and harsh noise, describing it as painful to hear. No musical content or performance details are discernible, so the show itself cannot be evaluated.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent negative reviews rate the recording as static and unusable; no positive aspects to offset this.

recording_quality.technical_notes: File contains only static, no audible music; described as shocking to ears and harmful to listen to.
